name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Outbound SMTP Connections
notes: This building block detects potential exfiltration over SMTP protocol.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Outbound SMTP Connections on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
when the event matches Destination Port is any of [25 or 587 or 465 or 2525]
when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of true

when the event matches "Process Name" ILIKE 'thunderbird.exe' OR "Process Name" ILIKE 'outlook.exe' OR "Process Path" ILIKE '%\Program Files\Microsoft\Exchange Server\%' OR ("Process Path" ILIKE '%\Program Files\WindowsApps\microsoft.windowscommunicationsapps%' AND "Process Name" ILIKE 'HxTsr.exe') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Outbound SMTP Connections on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit
AND when the event matches Destination Port is any of [25 or 587 or 465 or 2525]
AND when the event matches Initiated (custom) is any of true

AND NOT when the event matches "Process Name" ILIKE 'thunderbird.exe' OR "Process Name" ILIKE 'outlook.exe' OR "Process Path" ILIKE '%\Program Files\Microsoft\Exchange Server\%' OR ("Process Path" ILIKE '%\Program Files\WindowsApps\microsoft.windowscommunicationsapps%' AND "Process Name" ILIKE 'HxTsr.exe') AQL filter query
